query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suspended BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suspended_at TIMESTAMP,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suspended_by INTEGER REFERENCES users(id),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suspension_reason TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_active TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user NzNswwN3cq6gauf.53d7f32ec8a4 --database Md9ypRHK4yuz574ZuX5amw --execute ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suspended BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suspended_at TIMESTAMP,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suspended_by INTEGER REFERENCES users(id),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suspension_reason TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_active TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL;
